mapper.sql: source_key, is_enabled, max_pages, max_articles, request_interval_ms, content_type, placement, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM social.ingestion_source_config ORDER BY source_key ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social.ingestion_source_config ( source_key, is_enabled, max_pages, max_articles, request_interval_ms, content_type, placement, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sourceKey}, #{isEnabled}, #{maxPages}, #{maxArticles}, #{requestIntervalMs}, #{contentType}, #{placement}, COALESCE(#{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE}, now()), COALESCE(#{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE}, now()) ) ON CONFLICT (source_key) DO UPDATE SET is_enabled = EXCLUDED.is_enabled, max_pages = EXCLUDED.max_pages, max_articles = EXCLUDED.max_articles, request_interval_ms = EXCLUDED.request_interval_ms, content_type = EXCLUDED.content_type, placement = EXCLUDED.placement, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
